summary: Iteration 36 - Complete testing of notification system features. All backend tests passed (13/13). All UI components verified via Playwright. Features tested: 1) Notification bell button in header, 2) Notifications dropdown list, 3) Notification settings modal, 4) Subscription duration field in tenant creation form, 5) All notification APIs working correctly, 6) Auto-notifications on tenant create/activate/deactivate.
passed_tests: GET /api/super-admin/notifications - returns notifications list with unread_count
GET /api/super-admin/expiring-subscriptions - returns expiring_soon and already_expired lists
PUT /api/super-admin/notifications/read-all - marks all notifications as read
Auto-notification on new tenant creation - notification created with type 'new_tenant'
Auto-notification on tenant deactivation - notification created with type 'tenant_deactivated'
Auto-notification on tenant activation - notification created with type 'tenant_activated'
Subscription duration field - accepts 1, 3, 6, 12 months and stores correctly
UI: Notification bell button visible in header with badge count
UI: Notifications dropdown opens with list of notifications
UI: Notification settings modal shows all 4 toggle switches
UI: Subscription duration field appears when subscription type is 'basic' or 'premium'
UI: Subscription duration dropdown shows 4 options (1, 3, 6, 12 months)

notification_bell_button.description: Bell icon in header with unread count badge

notifications_dropdown.description: Dropdown list showing notifications with title, message, timestamp
features: Settings button to open settings modal

notification_settings_modal.title: إعدادات الإشعارات
fields: إشعار عند إضافة عميل جديد (notify_new_tenant) - toggle

subscription_duration_field.description: Appears only when subscription_type is NOT 'trial' or 'demo'

returns.expiring_soon: List of tenants expiring within days_before_expiry

critical_code_review_comments: Notification system is fully implemented with all required features
Auto-notifications are created correctly on tenant create/activate/deactivate
Notification settings are persisted in MongoDB settings collection
Subscription duration field correctly shows/hides based on subscription type
All notification APIs follow RESTful conventions with proper error handling
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_notifications_iter36.py - Created comprehensive test suite for notification system
seed_data_creation: Test tenants created and cleaned up during testing for notification verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 36 completed successfully. All notification system features verified: 1) Bell button in header with badge count - working, 2) Notifications dropdown with list, mark as read, delete - working, 3) Notification settings modal with 5 configurable options - working, 4) Subscription duration field (1, 3, 6, 12 months) appears for non-trial subscriptions - working, 5) All notification APIs (GET, PUT, DELETE) - working, 6) Auto-notifications on tenant create/activate/deactivate - working, 7) Expiring subscriptions API - working.
